channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: US Senator Lindsey Graham passes away
item.description: This is a breaking news story.

item.title: Ghana slavery apology: Why many descendants say words are not enough
item.description: Descendants of enslaved Africans say symbolic apologies cannot repair generations of loss and injustice.

item.title: Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani, architect of modern Qatar
item.description: The Father Emir oversaw the meteoric rise of the small gas-rich nation.

item.title: Former Emir of Qatar Sheikh Hamad bin Khalifa Al Thani dies aged 74
item.description: Sheikh Hamad, who ruled Qatar from 1995 to 2013, was a key architect of the energy-rich country's development.

item.title: US forces launch new strikes on Iran; Tehran closes Strait of Hormuz
item.description: US forces have launched a third round of strikes on Iran in a week.

item.title: Why doesn’t Indian PM Modi hold unscripted press conferences?
item.description: Why doesn't Indian PM Modi hold unscripted press conferences?

item.title: Iran launches attacks across the Gulf after more US strikes
item.description: Iran says it launched missile attacks on US military sites in Bahrain, Kuwait, Jordan and Qatar.

item.title: What was the mistaken identity red card shown in Argentina vs Switzerland?
item.description: Switzerland's Breel Embolo became the first player to be sent off after a VAR review in the last World Cup quarterfinal.

item.title: Which teams are in the World Cup semifinals, and what’s the match schedule?
item.description: Qualified teams, venues, kickoff times, key players, and how to watch the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinals.

item.title: McGregor injures knee, loses to Holloway in 69 seconds on UFC return
item.description: The referee stopped the welterweight contest at UFC 329 after McGregor fell to the mat three times in the first minute.

item.title: Argentina beat Switzerland to set up World Cup 2026 semifinal with England
item.description: Argentina need extra time to beat Switzerland 3-1 in the quarterfinals to set up a showdown with England on Wednesday.

item.title: England fans revel in World Cup win over Norway
item.description: Fans celebrated at a London watch party after England's 2-1 extra-time win over Norway in the World Cup quarter-finals.

item.title: Nigeria rescues dozens of abducted school children in Oyo state
item.description: Nigerian security forces have rescued 39 schoolchildren and five teachers abducted nearly two months ago in Oyo state.

item.title: Mediators push US-Iran talks in Qatar and Oman to avert escalation
item.description: Regional mediators are stepping up efforts to prevent further escalation between Iran and the US.

item.title: Bellingham scores twice as England beat Norway 2-1 to reach World Cup semis
item.description: Jude Bellingham scores in extra-time to send England into the World Cup semifinals for first time since 2018.

item.title: Iran war live: Tehran attacks Jordan, Gulf states after US bombardment
item.description: Iran targets Jordan and Gulf states after US bombs Iranian cities including Bandar Abbas, Sirik and Chabahar

item.title: Indian tourists killed after speedboat capsizes in Vietnam
item.description: Fifteen Indian tourists have died after their speedboat capsized off Vietnam’s Phu Quoc Island.

item.title: Whistleblower claims Kennedy Center ‘rushed’ renovations to please Trump
item.description: Democratic Senator Sheldon Whitehouse details rusting columns, uneven paint and unnecessary demolition under Trump.

item.title: FIFA to sell pieces of World Cup final stadium pitch, could earn millions
item.description: Pieces from the turf used at the stadium will go on sale as memorabilia and will be priced from $450 to $1,200.

item.title: US judge dismisses January 6 case against Proud Boys after Trump order
item.description: The case is the latest instance of the Trump administration seeking to unravel prosecutions against January 6 rioters.

item.title: Argentina 3-1 Switzerland (aet): FIFA World Cup 2026 – as it happened
item.description: All the updates from our live text commentary stream coverage as Messi's Argentina beat Switzerland to reach semifinals.

item.title: UK police investigate murder of politician Ann Widdecombe
item.description: Politician Ann Widdecombe was found dead with serious injuries, with police confirming a murder investigation underway

item.title: What’s behind Pakistan’s mass deportation of Afghans?
item.description: Islamabad cites national security concerns, returns thousands of undocumented migrants.

item.title: Thousands gather in Srebrenica to mark 31 years since genocide
item.description: Ten newly identified victims were buried as the more than 8,000 Bosnian Muslim men and boys killed were remembered.

item.title: ‘All we see is decay’: Covering the human toll of Venezuela’s earthquakes
item.description: As the death toll in Venezuela surges past 4,000, families continue to hold out hope that loved ones might be found.
